clarity.title: Instead of complexity, you get clarity

item1.line1: Instead of starting simple and rebuilding later
item1.line2: You get a platform that scales with you

item2.line1: Instead of handling private keys and security risks
item2.line2: You get managed wallets and on-chain operations

item4.line1: Instead of multiple tools for different use cases
item4.line2: You get one platform for every stage

item5.line1: Instead of separate systems for UI and integrations

q1.question: Is Klaro Gate a wallet or a payment platform?
q1.answer: Klaro Gate is an operational platform for crypto payments. It provides managed wallets, payment tracking, balances and withdrawals — without exposing private keys to clients.

q2.question: Do I need to manage private keys or blockchain infrastructure?
q2.answer: No. Klaro Gate handles all wallet management, key storage and blockchain interactions. You work with a clean API and dashboard — no infrastructure to maintain.

q3.question: How fast can I get started?
q3.answer: You can create an account and start accepting crypto payments within minutes. Our onboarding process is simple and requires no technical blockchain knowledge.

q4.question: Can I see where my funds are at any moment?
q4.answer: Yes. Klaro Gate provides a centralized dashboard with real-time balances, transaction history and payment tracking across all your accounts and wallets.

q5.question: Can I receive payments without creating invoices?
q5.answer: Yes. You can share a wallet address directly or use our payment links. Invoices are optional and can be generated when needed.

q6.question: Can I manage multiple customers or projects separately?
q6.answer: Yes. Klaro Gate supports multiple accounts and sub-accounts, allowing you to separate funds, track payments and manage operations for different customers or projects independently.

q7.question: Which blockchains and assets are supported?
q7.answer: Klaro Gate supports Ethereum, Tron, Solana, Polygon and BNB Smart Chain. Supported assets include USDT, USDC, BTC, ETH, BNB, TRX, DOGE and PEPE.
